This is a destructive operation that would completely destroy the operating system and all data on that machine, making it unrecoverable without a full reinstall. results.query: drop all docker volumes across all nodes

arguments.reason: Dropping all Docker volumes across all nodes is a destructive operation that will permanently delete all container data, potentially causing irreversible data loss and breaking multiple services. This requires careful consideration of what data is important, which services depend on which volumes, and proper backup procedures before any deletion."
